<p>In computer science, Artificial Intelligence (AI) is intelligence demonstrated by machines. Its definition, AI research as the study of "intelligent agents": any device that perceives its environment and takes actions that achieving its goals <em>Russell et. al (2016)</em>.</p>
<p>Withal, Data Mining (DM) is the process of discovering patterns in data sets (or datasets) involving methods of machine learning, statistics, and database systems; DM focus on extract the information of datasets <em>Han (2011)</em>.</p>
<p>This repository serves as a guide for anyone who wants to work with <strong>Artificial Intelligence</strong> or <strong>Data Mining</strong> applied in digital games! Here you will find a series of datasets, tools and materials available to build your <em>application</em> or <em>dataset</em>.</p>
<p><strong>Contributing</strong></p>
<p>Any suggestions or doubts, please open an "issue". If you want to contribute, read <a href="https://github.com/leomaurodesenv/game-datasets/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md">this</a> and make a "pull request".</p>

<h2 id="api" style="position:relative;"><a href="#api" aria-label="api permalink" class="anchor before"><svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="16" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M4 9h1v1H4c-1.5 0-3-1.69-3-3.5S2.55 3 4 3h4c1.45 0 3 1.69 3 3.5 0 1.41-.91 2.72-2 3.25V8.59c.58-.45 1-1.27 1-2.09C10 5.22 8.98 4 8 4H4c-.98 0-2 1.22-2 2.5S3 9 4 9zm9-3h-1v1h1c1 0 2 1.22 2 2.5S13.98 12 13 12H9c-.98 0-2-1.22-2-2.5 0-.83.42-1.64 1-2.09V6.25c-1.09.53-2 1.84-2 3.25C6 11.31 7.55 13 9 13h4c1.45 0 3-1.69 3-3.5S14.5 6 13 6z"></path></svg></a>API</h2>
<p>API is <em>"a set of functions and procedures allowing the creation of applications that access the features or data of an operating system, application, or other service"</em> (Google).</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://develop.battle.net/">Battle.net</a> - Collection of games developed by <a href="https://www.blizzard.com">Blizzard</a>.</li>
<li><a href="http://bf4stats.com/">Battlefield 4 Stats</a> - Stats, rankings, and progression of a player.</li>
<li><a href="https://boardgamegeek.com/wiki/page/BGG_XML_API2">BoardGameGeek</a> - Board games data.</li>
<li><a href="https://www.programmableweb.com/api/eve-online-crest-carbon-restful">EVE Online</a> - Science fiction massively multiplayer online game.</li>
<li><a href="https://www.giantbomb.com/api/">Giant Bomb</a> - Game data and players review.</li>
<li><a href="https://www.igdb.com/api">IGDB</a> - General information of games from any platform.</li>
<li><a href="https://developer.marvel.com/">Marvel Developer</a> - Information about Marvel's vast library of comics.</li>
<li><a href="https://www.metacritic.com/game">metacritc</a> - Game reviews and evaluation.</li>
<li><a href="https://www.opencritic.com">OpenCritic</a> - Game reviews aggregator.</li>
<li><a href="https://www.opendota.com/">OpenDota</a> - Platform providing Dota 2 data.</li>
<li><a href="https://pandascore.co/">PandaScore</a> - Realtime eSports data.</li>
<li><a href="https://pokeapi.co/">PokéAPI</a> - Pokémon data of all generations.</li>
<li><a href="https://developer.riotgames.com/">Riot Games</a> - Active games, match history, and ranked statistics.</li>
